title: Integrating DNA tetrahedron with affinity magnetic levitation for selective capture and sensitive detection of circulating tumor cells.
snippet: Circulating tumor cell (CTC) is an evidenced biomarker for early cancer diagnosis and assessment of treatment response. This necessitates increasing attempt to develop new method for detection of CTCs with highly enriching and anti-interference capacity. Herein, we built a simple platform for CTC detection by combining aptamer-mediated specific recognition....
